BB boolean gate is effectively a no-op without numeric companion (evidenced by 0.6% trigger rate). EUR_AUD 16:15 entry at exactly 3.0p floor filled then 404'd on reconcile — validator accepted a trade the gate should have blocked.

local_output: Run cowork distiller to extract chain-of-thought training pairs from today's Cowork scheduled-task sessions.
opus_correction: Core/cowork_distiller.py reports 'Found 0 Cowork transcripts' in sandbox because ~/.claude/projects/ isn't mounted. Fallback: list_sessions (178 total) + read_transcript closing-turn extraction for the substantive scheduled runs. 4 pairs written to session_training.db with source='cowork', all has_cot=1, quality>=0.88. FUSE mount quirk: fsync fails; clearing the stale -journal file and setting PRAGMA journal_mode=MEMORY + synchronous=OFF lets writes succeed on the virtiofs mount.
opus_reasoning: Two-step pipeline by design: (1) auto-distiller over ~/.claude/projects/ catches host-side sessions; (2) manual fallback via list_sessions/read_transcript catches sandbox scheduled-task sessions that don't persist. Closing assistant message carries the full report output for scheduled-task-style sessions, so read_transcript(limit=5-30) is sufficient without pulling intermediate tool_uses.
